what_broke: Two profiles for the same events under different slugs: landrun-100.json duplicate of mid-south.json, and sbt-grvl.json duplicate of steamboat-gravel.json, inflating the race count
root_cause: AI-generated/batch-research profiles created the same race twice under alternate slug spellings
fix_applied: Removed landrun-100.json (kept mid-south.json) and sbt-grvl.json (kept steamboat-gravel.json)
regression_check: immune_check.py check_fuzzy_duplicates() — fuzzy name-similarity >= 0.88 flags near-duplicate slugs
verified: immune_check.py 2026-07-11: neither landrun-100.json nor sbt-grvl.json present; 757 profiles

what_broke: Bare /methodology/ path 404'd — the canonical page lives at /race/methodology/ and nothing redirected the bare path
root_cause: The .htaccess rewrite rules generated by push_wordpress.py had no rule for the bare /methodology/ path
fix_applied: Added `RewriteRule ^methodology/?$ /race/methodology/ [R=301,L]` to push_wordpress.py's generated rewrite rules (commit 01ce8558)
regression_check: immune_check.py --live run_live_link_check() flags any dead same-site link as a YELLOW dead-link finding

what_broke: balatonfondo's published tier (T2) had drifted from its web-verified vitals — rankings claims had gone stale for months without re-verification
root_cause: No process re-verified published distance/elevation/field-size/prestige inputs against the live event after initial scoring
fix_applied: scripts/verify_race_rankings.py web-verified the vitals, recomputed Length/Elevation criteria from docs/GRAVEL_GOD_SCORING_SYSTEM.md, and recalculated overall_score/tier — balatonfondo dropped T2->T3 (commit 473c935d)
regression_check: immune_check.py run_profile_audit() (audit_race_data.audit_race) flags any future TIER MISMATCH between overall_score and tier; scripts/verify_race_rankings.py runs weekly (Thursdays) via .github/workflows/rankings-veracity.yml
verified: immune_check.py 2026-07-11: race-data/balatonfondo.json tier=3, score=56 (consistent, no TIER MISMATCH)
